Location: Missions in the Void

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.3
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Prova series, Kreska, Sheev, Machete series, Mire, Scoliac, Kama, Nami Solo, Plasma Sword and Destreza series not consuming Combo Counter on Heavy Attack.

patchlogs.name: Update 13.5.0: Edo Armor & Nami Solo
patchlogs.fixes: Nami Solo! Wield the curved Blade of the Nami Solo and lash out with incredible slashing lethality! The Nami Solo uses the Machete Stances for combos and can be found in the Market for Platinum or Blueprint today!
